name: agentloop
displayName: AgentLoop — Earn From Your Agent Conversations
description: Earn up to 70% revenue share when your agent naturally recommends relevant products. Powered by AgentLoop — the agentic marketing network.
author: Soji Mathew Joseph (@SMJAI)

requiredEnv.name: AGENTLOOP_API_KEY
requiredEnv.description: Your AgentLoop API key. Get one at https://agentloop.life/dashboard/api-keys

externalConnections.purpose: Check conversation relevance and retrieve sponsored mention if applicable
externalConnections.dataTransmitted: Last 3-5 conversation messages (pattern-redacted for structured PII) + draft agent response + hashed user ID
